page_titles.temperature: निरीक्षण अउ पूर्वानुमान পৃষ্ঠ वायु तापमान

page_intros.rainfall: Ei nakha gora dinar baral dekhai aru India Meteorological Department (IMD) er Extended Range Forecast System (ERFS) theke toiri hoye, 1955 theke aji porjonto er masik total baral percentile hisebe deya. Ei baral percentile nakha gora sei samay er jonno asadharon shukno, jhol, ba modhye baral poribeshgulo ke alada kore dekhai. Forecast mas e uchcho baral percentile, ar bortoman mas e uchcho shatabdi jhol (page 4 e nakha thakbe) thakle, asadharon jhol obosthar ekta sambhabo dekhaite pare. Forecast mas e nichcho baral percentile, jodi tar sathe minimal ba kono baral na thake ar shatabdi shukno thake, tahole shukno obosthar jonyo jhogra hote pare.
page_intros.temperature: ei nakha gora dinik gridded temperature observation aru India Meteorological Department (IMD) er Extended Range Forecast System (ERFS) thikana theke toiri aai, je ta itihasik madhyam (1955 theke aji) theke masik-madhyam temperature anomaly hisebe prastut aai. ei temperature anomaly maps gulo ta aamti theke beshi aru kom temperature thaka kshetrgulo highlight kore. Kom temperature anomaly gulo crop yield koma athaba crop growth der modhye deri hote pare. Beshi temperature anomaly aru thikana jodi kom barsha aru kom soil moisture thake (page 4 e maps aai) tahole drought condition aru increased potential evapotranspiration er jonne risk thaka pare.
page_intros.wetness: ei nakha gora dinar mitti moisture (60 cm depth) ke upar India Meteorological Department (IMD) er observation o Extended Range Forecast System (ERFS) theke gridded meteorological forcing use kore historical mean (1955 theke aji) theke monthly-averaged soil moisture anomaly hisebe tayar kora hoyeche. soil moisture anomaly gulo historical extremes er sathe tulona kore prastut kora hoyeche jate asadharan jhol ba sukha obostha thaka kshetreke highlight kora hoy. ekhon er mahine high relative wetness (jhol) o forecast mahine high rainfall percentile thakle aageer din/shiter asadharan jhol obostha ba flow hote pare. ekhon er mahine low relative wetness (sukha) o forecast mahine rainfall na ba khub kom thakle normal er cheye kom flow o moisture availability er jhogra hote pare.
page_intros.runoff: Ei nakha gora dinar simulete total runoff se tayar kora gridded meteorological forcing thikana observation aru India Meteorological Department (IMD) er Extended Range Forecast System (ERFS) thikana theke, je historic mean (1955 theke aji) theke total runoff monthly anomaly hisaabey bhabe byabohrito. Ei total runoff anomaly gulo tora somoy er tulona theke total runoff eke relative surplus ba deficit thaka region gulo highlight kore. Forecast month e total runoff e surplus aru current month e soil moisture relative bhabe jodi beshi thake tahole aagun din/week e streamflow upar-normal hote pare. Forecast month e total runoff e high deficit thaka area gulo, jodi current month e high dryness thake, tahole aagun din/week e streamflow relative low hote pare.
page_intros.et: Ei nakha gora dinar simulete evapotranspiration (ET) thikana gridded meteorologic forcing thikana observation aru India Meteorological Department (IMD) er Extended Range Forecast System (ERFS) thikana theke nirmit, je historic (1955 theke aji) total monthly ET anomaly hisaab e. Ei ET anomaly gulo janiye thikana gulo jaha jhamai aru paudha theke aamoni thikana theke koma athaba beshi jol ghotale, je crop water stress er khatare thikana gulo ke pinpoint korte sahajyo kore, khas kore extreme weather impact aru crop water stress. Low ET anomaly gulo crop water stress beshi aru jhol thikana koma thikana thikana thikana. High ET anomaly gulo soil moisture jhol te taratari khali hobo (flash drought) athaba aage thaka drought gulo kharap hote pare.

about.about_body: ei dastaa aji india mate paani ra bhabna deye. e me month, pichhu char month, aaru ek month er forecast samet. ei bhabna observational data aaru meteorological variables mate extended-range forecasting system aaru advanced hydrological modeling tools use karke toiri hoyeche. ei tools gulo relative changes analyze aaru various regions mate paani upalabdhi predict kore, india mate hydrological sthiti mate mulyaful insight de. IIT Gandhinagar mate Water and Climate Lab dwara vikasito ei bhabna rainfall, temperature, soil moisture (60 cm), runoff, aaru streamflow patterns across different timescales mate bharosari information deke paani resource management, planning, aaru decision-making mate sahajjo deba.
about.datasets_body_pre: India er jalgoner darshana tora kora hoya anek data provider er mulya mulya sahyog dwara jara tora yogdaan gurutoro bhabe manaba hoya. Ajamai dinar darshana aru bishal porichay data India Meteorological Department (IMD) dwara deya hoya.
about.datasets_body_mid: Eia dataset gela hydrologic model initialize kiyai aji historical analogue gela statistical analysis dwara bharosari outlook information generate kiyai. Hydrologic model India-Water Information System theke daily streamflow dwara pora samay aji calibrate aji validate kiyai.
about.model_body: India Hydrological Outlook eka Variable Infiltration Capacity model use kare, eka ekda large-scale, semi-distributed hydrological model je grid har water a energy budget calculate kare. VIC model vegetation a elevation er sub-grid variability capture kare, je regional scale e hydrological process er more accurate representation provide kare. VIC model simulation daily temporal resolution e perform kare je accurate hydrological forecast provide a water resource management India bhar e enhance kare.
about.disclaimer_body: India Hydrological Outlook eka sabdha deya jani thakle thik ahe ane vartaman vigyan samajh thi mel ahe. pan meteorologic ane hydrological forecast ane climate projection jyanu thaliyo vigyan niyamit roop thi badal rahe. etle, content ma aavela koi forecast athva prediction satya ni nishchit statement nahe mane. lagu niyam dwara anumati thaya jya, India Hydrological Outlook content sambandhi jya warranty athva representation nahe dehe, jya spasht athva anupatmak hoy. content no tumara upyog poori rite tamara nijya jokhim par, ane amara content shuddha athva tamara vishesh jaruriyat mate upyogi hone no koi guarantee nathi ahe.
about.funding_body: India Hydrological Outlook ke samarthan Major Research and Development Programme (MRDP) dwara Hydro Climate Extremes mein aadharito, jise Department of Science and Technology (DST) dwara fund kiya gaya.
about.contact_address: India Hydrological Outlook Water and Climate Lab Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar Gujarat India
about.person1_dept: Department of Civil Engineering, IIT Gandhinagar
